no: Improved Archer Kit by Argent77. Adds 4 ranged-focused kits (Ranger, Fighter, Paladin, Thief) plus late-game ammo/bows. All 5 components are fully independent — no internal dependencies. Each kit adds 1 kit slot (4 total if all installed). Well-coded, EET compatible.

conflicts.reason: M&G #225 rewrites Archer CLAB (hard conflict with A7 overhaul). M&G #151 reclasses Archer to Fighter, breaking A7's ranger-based kit. Choose one Archer approach.
conflicts.theirComps: #225 Revised Archers #151 Move Archer to Fighter
conflicts.source: Both strip SPCL121 Called Shot and rewrite clabrn02.2da. Other A7/M&G component combos are safe, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both modify Archer kit CLAB and bonuses. A7 cn:0 completely overhauls the Archer (new special shots, rebalanced progression, rewrites clabrn02.2da). SnA cn:170 applies a minor fix to match kit description THAC0/damage bonuses. A7's overhaul supersedes SnA's fix. Removed SnA cn:170 .
conflicts.theirComps: #170 Update Archer per kit description (REMOVED from Ultimate preset)
conflicts.source: A7 rewrites clabrn02.2da entirely; SnA cn:170 patches same CLAB; A7 supersedes, 2026-04

passive.desc: +5% critical hit chance at level 13 and 18 (total +10%)

activated.effects: 12 sec: ranged hits entangle target. Duration 3-5 rounds, save vs Spell (penalty scales with level).
12 sec: ranged hits knock back target. Save vs Breath (penalty scales with level).
12 sec: ranged hits deal 1d4 (+2/4 levels) AoE physical damage in 15' radius (friend or foe).
Creates 20 enchanted arrows/bolts (8hr). Scales: +1 fire (lv4) to +4 multi-elemental with slow/blind (lv20). Double charges at lv8 and lv16.

restrictions.items: Max 1 slot in melee weapons. No Charm Animal. -1 CON modifier.

hlaPool.note: Adds Sure Shot (requires War Cry) and Missile Trap

spellRestrictions.note: Standard ranger druid spellcasting retained. No Charm Animal ability.

passive.desc: +5% critical hit chance at level 13 and 18 (total +10%)

activated.effects: 12 sec: ranged hits entangle target. Duration 3-5 rounds, save vs Spell (penalty scales).
12 sec: ranged hits knock back target. Save vs Breath (penalty scales).
12 sec: ranged hits deal AoE physical damage in 15' radius (friend or foe).
Creates 20 arrows/bolts/bullets. Scales: cumulative AC/THAC0 debuffs on targets (save vs Death), knockback and stun at higher levels.

restrictions.items: Max 2 slots in melee weapons. Fighting styles max 1. Requires DEX 17 for dual-class.

hlaPool.note: Adds Sure Shot to fighter HLA pool

passive.desc: +5% critical hit chance at level 13 and 18 (total +10%)

activated.effects: 12 sec: ranged hits entangle target. Duration 3-5 rounds, save vs Spell (penalty scales).
12 sec: ranged hits knock back target. Save vs Breath (penalty scales). No Explosive Shot.
Creates 20 arrows/bolts/bullets (8hr). Bonus magic damage vs undead/fiends. Scales: 1d6 (lv4) to 1d6+8 with hold (lv20). Double charges at lv8/16.

restrictions.items: Max 1 slot in melee weapons. Fighting styles max 1. Cannot dual-class.

hlaPool.note: Adds Sure Shot to paladin HLA pool

passive.desc: +5% critical hit chance at level 18 only

activated.effects: 12 sec: ranged hits entangle target. Duration 3-5 rounds, save vs Spell (penalty scales).
12 sec: ranged hits deal AoE physical damage in 15' radius (friend or foe). No Power Shot.
Creates 20 arrows/bolts. Cumulative AC/THAC0 debuffs plus bleeding and blindness vs humanoids at higher levels.

restrictions.items: Only 15 thief skill points per level (vs 25). Cannot use longbows. Cannot use bullets.

hlaPool.note: Adds Missile Trap to thief HLA pool

new: Enhanced ranger archer with improved Called Shot and ranged weapon bonuses.
Thief variant focused on ranged combat. Sniper-like precision with ranged weapons.
Paladin variant focused on archery. Ranged holy warrior with mounted combat.
Stealthy ranged specialist preferring to engage enemies from a distance.

sum: Improved Archer Kit as WeiDU mod for BG2, BG:EE, BG2:EE and IWD:EE

co.no: Improved Archer (Ranger kit). Rebalances Archer: stronger at high levels, less dominant early. Grants bonus damage, AC vs missiles, critical hits, and 4 special shots: Rooting Shot (entangle), Power Shot (knockback), Explosive Shot (AoE), Conjure Elemental Ammunition. Each component is independent — REQUIRE_COMPONENT is commented out in tp2. Adds 1 kit slot.

Marksman (Fighter kit). Archer mechanics adapted for Fighter class. Uses Reinforced Ammunition instead of elemental. No Set Missile Trap. Allows 2 melee proficiency slots. Independent of cn:0. Adds 1 kit slot.
Bow Knight (Paladin kit). Ranged-focused Paladin with Blessed Ammunition. No Explosive Shot or Missile Trap. 1 melee proficiency slot max. Independent of cn:0. Adds 1 kit slot.

Sharpshooter (Thief kit). Ranged thief with weaker missile bonuses (every 5-8 levels). Crafts Endowed Ammunition. No Power Shot or Sure Shot HLA. Restricted skill points and backstab. Independent of cn:0. Adds 1 kit slot.

co.n: Add +4 arrows, bolts and powerful bows to the game
co.tp2n: Add +4 arrows, bolts and powerful bows to the game
co.no: Adds +4 arrows, +4 bolts, and 2 legendary longbows to late-game. BG2/EET: Watcher's Keep and Sendai's Enclave. No kit dependency — standalone item addition.
